 Mountain Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Center in Utah
 

 

 
 Cirque Lodge > Treatment > Mountain Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Center in Utah 

 

Mountain Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Center in Utah

 Our mental health is very delicate and can be influenced by many things. 

When we add addictive substances to the mix with an existing mental health condition or unresolved trauma, the effects can be even more extreme. Trauma can fuel substance use as a way to cope, while addiction can intensify emotional distress, creating a vicious cycle.

At Cirque Lodge, we offer integrated programs that treat trauma, mental health conditions, and substance use disorders together. We provide treatment to work with the ‘whole client,’ and our programs are personalized to meet their individual needs. We are dedicated to providing the highest levels of compassion and pride ourselves on privacy and clinical excellence.

 Contact Us 

 
 

 
Jump To section

 

 
 
 

 What is Dual Diagnosis? 
 
 
 

 Our Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Facilities 
 
 
 

 Our Admissions Process 
 
 
 

 Embark on Your Healing Journey at Cirque Lodge 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
What is Dual Diagnosis?

 
 A dual diagnosis is when a client presents with a mental health condition and substance use disorder (SUD). It is also known as comorbidity and co-occurring disorders. 

Examples of dual diagnosis include:

 

Co-occurring Substance Abuse Disorder and mood disorders (depression, bipolar disorder)

Co-occurring Substance Abuse Disorder and anxiety disorder

Co-occurring Substance Abuse Disorder and post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD)

 

Addiction scientists continue to research the relationship between mental health issues and substance misuse. Research is ongoing and aims to increase the efficacy of dual diagnosis treatment. evidence-based treatment approaches have been developed to help those struggling with dual diagnosis.

Mental health conditions impact how one thinks, perceives, feels, and behaves. There is a broad spectrum of mental health conditions, some of the most common being:

 

Depression

Anxiety

Trauma/Post-traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD)

Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD)

Bipolar disorder

Borderline personality disorder (BPD)

Schizophrenia

 

Substance Abuse issues occur when a person has misused drugs and/or alcohol for a prolonged period of time, which often leads to physical and/or mental dependence. The body becomes accustomed to the presence of a given substance in the system, and when the substance is not taken, the body struggles to function without it.

Dependence is a precursor for addiction, and when a person becomes addicted to drugs or alcohol, it can be devastating. Addiction can affect all aspects of our wellbeing, including our physical, behavioral, psychological, and social health.

Substance misuse has a significant negative impact on a person’s life and the lives of those around them. Drugs and alcohol alter our mood and behavior, leading to job loss, strained or lost relationships, financial problems, and legal issues.

Professional treatment is the best option for dual diagnosis treatment, and at Cirque Lodge, you will receive medical detox, comprehensive rehabilitation, and aftercare support. If you or someone you love struggles with co-occurring substance abuse and mental health issues, our integrated program can help.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Our Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Facilities

 
 Nestled amidst the breathtaking beauty of the Rocky Mountains, Cirque Lodge provides an unparalleled environment for recovery. Our luxury dual diagnosis treatment facilities in Utah combine world-class medical treatment with the serenity of nature, creating a haven for individuals on their healing journey. 

 At Cirque Lodge, we offer both private and shared accommodation options, each designed with comfort and tranquility in mind. Every space is tastefully decorated and equipped with modern amenities to provide a homely yet luxury ambiance. Our facilities also boast a state-of-the-art fitness center, meditation rooms, and gourmet dining, alongside outdoor recreational areas for experiential therapies. The tranquil surroundings and our commitment to privacy ensure that every individual can focus wholly on their path to recovery. 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Our Admissions Process

 
 At Cirque Lodge, we’ve strived to make our admissions process as straightforward and stress-free as possible. 

 Our compassionate admissions team is available 24/7 to assist you, ready to answer any questions you might have about our dual diagnosis program, facilities, or insurance-related queries. Once the decision to proceed with admission is made, we work diligently to ensure a smooth and swift intake process.  

 Our team guides you through every step, from initial assessment to customized treatment plan development. We understand that the decision to seek help for dual diagnosis can be overwhelming, and we’re here to support you at every turn, ensuring a seamless transition into our caring and therapeutic environment. 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Embark on Your Healing Journey at Cirque Lodge

 
 At Cirque Lodge’s luxury dual diagnosis treatment centers, we offer a peaceful setting for dual diagnosis treatment. We believe that recovery requires more than just clinical care; it also necessitates an environment where individuals can relax, reflect, and rejuvenate. 

 The program at our luxury dual diagnosis treatment center is marked by compassionate and evidence-based treatment approaches, including medical detox, comprehensive rehabilitation, and aftercare support. By focusing on the roots of both substance abuse and mental trauma recovery , our dedicated team helps patients cultivate healthier coping mechanisms, improve self-esteem, and foster better interpersonal relationships. 

 Through individualized treatment plans, experiential therapies, and group counseling sessions, the professionals at our luxury dual diagnosis treatment centers address not only the symptoms but also the underlying causes of the disorders. We integrate mind-body therapies, such as yoga, meditation, and mindfulness, with conventional therapeutic approaches to promote comprehensive healing. 

 Whether you or a loved one struggles with a dual diagnosis, Cirque Lodge’s integrated program can provide the help you need or help you find out how to help someone you love with addiction. Our commitment is to help our clients and their families rediscover their strength, regain their health, and reclaim their lives.  

 Reach out to us today, and take the first step on the path to recovery in the serenity of our luxury dual diagnosis treatment centers in Utah. 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Looking for an drug detox near me?

 

 
 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
FAQs About Luxury Drug Rehab

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 Who Needs a Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Center?
 
 

 
 Individuals struggling with both a mental health condition and a substance use disorder may benefit from staying at a exceptional dual diagnosis treatment center. This type of treatment is also ideal for those who value privacy, comfort, and a comprehensive, personalized approach to recovery. 

 

 

 

 
 What Kinds of Mental Health Conditions Can Be Treated Alongside Substance Use Disorders?
 
 

 
 Common mental health conditions treated alongside substance use disorders include depression, anxiety disorders, post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD), bipolar disorder, attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD), borderline personality disorder (BPD), and schizophrenia. 

 

 

 

 
 What Therapies Are Used in Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Centers?
 
 

 
 A wide range of evidence-based therapies are used at luxury dual diagnosis treatment centers, including cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT), dialectical behavior therapy (DBT), individual and group counseling, family therapy, and experiential therapies such as art therapy, equine therapy, and outdoor adventure therapy. 

 

 

 

 
 How Long Does the Dual Diagnosis Treatment Process Typically Last?
 
 

 
 The duration of treatment can vary greatly depending on the individual’s specific needs and the severity of their conditions.  

 In general, treatment can range from 30 days to several months. The treatment team will work closely with the individual to create a tailored treatment plan that best fits their recovery needs. 

 

 

 

 
 Is Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Covered by Insurance?
 
 

 
 When you’re searching “luxury dual diagnosis treatment centers near me,” one of the best ways to narrow down your results is to determine which facilities accept your insurance.  

 Cirque Lodge accepts coverage from many major insurance carriers. However, coverage can vary significantly by insurance provider and policy. It’s essential to reach out to your insurance company or speak with the admissions team at the treatment center to understand what costs may be covered. 

 

 

 

 
 What Happens After the Completion of the Treatment Program?
 
 

 
 After treatment, luxury dual diagnosis treatment centers like Cirque Lodge make effective aftercare a top priority.  

 Aftercare is a critical component of dual diagnosis treatment. This can include ongoing outpatient counseling, group therapy, alumni programs, and more to support the individual in maintaining their recovery. The goal is to ensure that the individual has the necessary resources and support to prevent relapse and manage their mental health effectively.

A Safe Place to Heal and Recover

 

Our individualized treatment programs offer an enriching rehabilitation experience tailored to suit your needs. The breathtaking mountains surrounding our center are the perfect place to heal. Our magnificent location offers unique opportunities to reconnect with your true self and rediscover your love of life.

 

 
 More About Us 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

 
Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.

<h2 class="wp-block-heading h2" id="mountain-luxury-drug-and-alcohol-detoxification-program">Mountain Luxury Drug and Alcohol Detoxification Program</h2>



<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p><strong>Detoxification is the first and most crucial step to overcoming alcoholism or drug addiction and reclaiming your health and life.</strong> At Cirque Lodge, we offer a private, medically supervised detox program in a serene and comfortable environment, supported by a dedicated team of licensed medical professionals. This team ensures thorough care throughout the detox process, addressing the physical and mental challenges of withdrawal.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>Substance abuse over time conditions the body to rely on these substances, and cessation can lead to withdrawal symptoms, which may include physical and psychological distress. Our focus is on stabilizing individuals in a safe and supportive setting.</p>
</div>
</div>

        <div class="child-slider__item-text">
            <h3 id="exceptional-medical-detox-services">Exceptional Medical Detox Services</h3>
            <p><strong>At Cirque Lodge, we employ a medically supervised approach to detox, recognized as the safest and most effective method.</strong> Under the care of experienced physicians, nurses, and medical staff, we use advanced equipment and, when necessary, medications to ease withdrawal symptoms and curb cravings.</p>
<p>Our <a href="/treatment/detox/medical/">detoxification services</a> follow industry-leading protocols tailored to individual needs. Regular check-ins with the medical team ensure that every patient is comfortable and well-supported throughout the process. We are committed to making this challenging phase as calm and manageable as possible, offering personalized care.</p>

                <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Detox-Page-Replace-Beach-High-Five-Guys-275x700-c-center.webp" media="(min-width: 992px)" />
                <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Detox-Page-Replace-Beach-High-Five-Guys-320x700-c-center.webp" media="(min-width: 768px)" >
                <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Detox-Page-Replace-Beach-High-Five-Guys-660x690-c-center.webp" media="(min-width: 400px)" >
                <img decoding="async" class="child-slider__item-picture-image" src="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Detox-Page-Replace-Beach-High-Five-Guys-360x400-c-center.webp" alt="Detoxification Advice" width="360" height="400" loading="lazy" />
            </picture>
        </div>
        <div class="child-slider__item-text">
            <h3 id="detoxification-advice">Detoxification Advice</h3>
            <p data-pm-slice="1 1 []"><strong>For those considering at-home detox for a loved one, we strongly recommend consulting medical professionals beforehand.</strong> Without appropriate training and resources, home detox can pose significant health risks. Professional inpatient facilities like Cirque Lodge provide around-the-clock medical supervision to monitor and address potential complications, ensuring a safer experience.</p>
<p>Physical discomfort is often a side effect of going through the detox process, which can lead one back to their drug of choice. Pain from this process can be eased at times with special care, including:</p>
<ul>
<li>Drinking plenty of juices and water</li>
<li>Exercise at a comfortable level</li>
<li>Soft, clean sheets and bedding</li>
<li>Quiet, low-lit rooms to relax and be at peace</li>
</ul>
<p>Our facility eliminates daily stressors like meal preparation and laundry, allowing individuals to focus entirely on recovery. Our amenities such as comfortable bedding and peaceful surroundings promote physical and emotional healing.</p>
<h4 id="what-are-some-symptoms-of-withdrawal">What Are Some Symptoms of Withdrawal?</h4>
<p data-pm-slice="1 1 []">Withdrawal symptoms vary depending on the substance and level of dependency. Common physical symptoms include headaches, anxiety, and sleep disturbances, while severe cases might involve vomiting, diarrhea, or seizures. Alcohol withdrawal, in particular, can present life-threatening risks that require immediate medical attention.</p>
<p>Psychological symptoms such as depression and anxiety are also prevalent and may lead to volatility or suicidal ideation. Cirque Lodge’s comprehensive detox program is designed to address both physical and mental symptoms, ensuring safety and comfort.</p>
<h4 id="how-long-does-withdrawal-last">How Long Does Withdrawal Last?</h4>
<p data-pm-slice="1 1 []">Withdrawal symptoms typically begin within 8-24 hours of stopping substance use and may last 24-72 hours or longer. However, the duration and intensity can vary based on the individual’s history of substance use. Psychological effects like depression may persist for weeks. At Cirque Lodge, our approach prioritizes ongoing care and support, recognizing that detox is only the first step.</p>
<h4 id="is-detox-all-that-is-needed-to-overcome-addiction">Is Detox All That Is Needed to Overcome Addiction?</h4>
<p data-pm-slice="1 1 []">Detox alone is not sufficient to overcome addiction. It is the foundation for further treatment, which includes behavioral therapies and counseling. At Cirque Lodge, patients transition seamlessly from detox into our addiction treatment program, tailored to their unique needs.</p>

        </div>
        </div>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="our-luxury-detox-facilities-in-utah">Our Luxury Detox Facilities in Utah</h2>



<p>Nestled in the breathtaking beauty of Sundance, Utah, Cirque Lodge provides a serene setting for recovery. Private and shared rooms with premium amenities, a world-class fitness center, and access to nature-based therapies create an environment that supports holistic healing. Activities such as equine therapy, hiking, and meditation are integral to our approach, fostering physical and emotional well-being.</p>

<h3 class="wp-block-heading" id="our-admissions-process">Our Admissions Process</h3>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we simplify the admissions process to reduce stress. Our admissions team is available 24/7 to guide you through each step. The process begins with a confidential phone assessment to evaluate the individual’s needs and determine the appropriate level of care.</p>



<p>Once treatment requirements are identified, we coordinate with patients and their families to ensure a smooth transition into our program. From the first call to arrival at our mountain luxury detox center, we strive to provide comfort, support, and clarity.</p>

  <div class="faq__items" data-style="alternative">
          <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          What Makes a Detox Center Luxury?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>The best luxury detox retreats offer high-end, personalized treatment services in a comfortable and serene environment.</p>
<p>Alongside expert medical and therapeutic care, luxury detox centers provide amenities and services typically found in luxury hotels, such as private rooms, world-class gyms, and gourmet meals. These amenities are all aimed at making the recovery process more comfortable.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          Are Luxury Detox Centers More Effective?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>While the core treatment principles remain the same, luxury detox centers often provide a higher staff-to-client ratio, ensuring more personalized care.</p>
<p>In addition, the comfortable environment, holistic therapies, and high-end amenities may contribute to a more positive treatment experience, potentially improving outcomes. However, the effectiveness of any detox center, exceptional or otherwise, greatly depends on individual commitment and the quality of the services provided.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          How Long Does Detoxification Usually Take at a Luxury Detox Center?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>Many of our clients start treatment wondering <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/blog/how-long-does-it-take-to-detox-from-alcohol/">how long it takes to detox from alcohol </a>at a exceptional medical detox facility like Cirque Lodge. The answer can vary based on several factors.</p>
<p>The length of the detox process depends on the type and severity of the substance use disorder, the individual’s physical health, and their response to treatment. Generally, the time it takes to <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/blog/how-to-detox-your-body-from-drugs/">detox the body from drugs</a> at a exceptional detox center can last anywhere from a few days to a couple of weeks.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          What Types of Therapies Are Offered at Luxury Detox Centers?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>Luxury detox centers like Cirque Lodge offer a wide range of therapies, from traditional options like individual and group therapy to holistic and experiential therapies such as art, music, and equine therapy. Nature-based activities and fitness programs are also commonly incorporated.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          Is Detox the Same as Treatment?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>Detox is only the first step in the treatment process. It focuses on managing withdrawal symptoms and clearing the body of harmful substances. Comprehensive treatment involves therapy to address the underlying issues related to addiction, build coping skills, and prepare for long-term recovery.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          Are Luxury Detox Centers Private?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>Luxury detox centers like Cirque Lodge prioritize the privacy and confidentiality of their clients. They often offer private rooms and ensure a discreet treatment experience.</p>

        </div>
      </div>
                      <div class="faq__item">
        <button class="faq__question">
          Do Luxury Detox Centers Accept Insurance?
        </button>
        <div class="faq__answer">
          <p>When searching “luxury detox near me”, one of the most important criteria to narrow down is whether a facility accepts your insurance. Luckily, Cirque Lodge accepts insurance for our detox and treatment services. However, the extent of coverage depends on your specific insurance plan. Our admissions team can help verify your benefits and clarify your coverage details.</p>

        </div>
      </div>

<script id='script-67bdc57539a1a-js' type='text/javascript'>
var option_button_pdf = {
    source:'https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Brochure-for-Website-compressed-1-1-1-1.pdf',
    webgl:true,
};

function loadDFlipAssets() {
    // Add CSS file
    const link = document.createElement("link");
    link.rel = "stylesheet";
    link.href = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/css/components/dflip.min.css";
    document.head.appendChild(link);

    // Add JS file
    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/js/components/dflip.min.js";
    script.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.remove('loading');
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').click();
        }, 2500);
    });
    document.body.appendChild(script);
}
if (document.querySelector('.dear-flip a'))
document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('href', '#');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('loading');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('_df_button');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf')
    loadDFlipAssets();
}, { once: true })

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    if (window.location.hash.startsWith('#button_pdf')) {
        const link = document.querySelector('.dear-flip a');
        if (link) {
            link.setAttribute('href', '#');
            link.classList.add('loading');
            link.classList.add('_df_button');
            link.setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf');
            loadDFlipAssets();
        }
    }
});
</script>

 Luxury Detox Centers: Drug and Alcohol Detoxification Program at Cirque Lodge
 

 

 
 Cirque Lodge > Treatment > Luxury Detox Centers: Drug and Alcohol Detoxification Program at Cirque Lodge 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 

Mountain Luxury Drug and Alcohol Detoxification Program

 Detoxification is the first and most crucial step to overcoming alcoholism or drug addiction and reclaiming your health and life. At Cirque Lodge, we offer a private, medically supervised detox program in a serene and comfortable environment, supported by a dedicated team of licensed medical professionals. This team ensures thorough care throughout the detox process, addressing the physical and mental challenges of withdrawal.

Substance abuse over time conditions the body to rely on these substances, and cessation can lead to withdrawal symptoms, which may include physical and psychological distress. Our focus is on stabilizing individuals in a safe and supportive setting.

 
 

 
Jump To section

 

 
 
 

 Exceptional Medical Detox Services 
 
 
 

 Detoxification Advice 
 
 
 

 Cirque Lodge Detox Facility 
 
 
 

 Transition Into Treatment 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Exceptional Medical Detox Services

 
 At Cirque Lodge, we employ a medically supervised approach to detox, recognized as the safest and most effective method. Under the care of experienced physicians, nurses, and medical staff, we use advanced equipment and, when necessary, medications to ease withdrawal symptoms and curb cravings.

Our detoxification services follow industry-leading protocols tailored to individual needs. Regular check-ins with the medical team ensure that every patient is comfortable and well-supported throughout the process. We are committed to making this challenging phase as calm and manageable as possible, offering personalized care.

 Contact Us 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Detoxification Advice

 
 For those considering at-home detox for a loved one, we strongly recommend consulting medical professionals beforehand. Without appropriate training and resources, home detox can pose significant health risks. Professional inpatient facilities like Cirque Lodge provide around-the-clock medical supervision to monitor and address potential complications, ensuring a safer experience.

Physical discomfort is often a side effect of going through the detox process, which can lead one back to their drug of choice. Pain from this process can be eased at times with special care, including:

 

Drinking plenty of juices and water

Exercise at a comfortable level

Soft, clean sheets and bedding

Quiet, low-lit rooms to relax and be at peace

 

Our facility eliminates daily stressors like meal preparation and laundry, allowing individuals to focus entirely on recovery. Our amenities such as comfortable bedding and peaceful surroundings promote physical and emotional healing.

What Are Some Symptoms of Withdrawal?

Withdrawal symptoms vary depending on the substance and level of dependency. Common physical symptoms include headaches, anxiety, and sleep disturbances, while severe cases might involve vomiting, diarrhea, or seizures. Alcohol withdrawal, in particular, can present life-threatening risks that require immediate medical attention.

Psychological symptoms such as depression and anxiety are also prevalent and may lead to volatility or suicidal ideation. Cirque Lodge’s comprehensive detox program is designed to address both physical and mental symptoms, ensuring safety and comfort.

How Long Does Withdrawal Last?

Withdrawal symptoms typically begin within 8-24 hours of stopping substance use and may last 24-72 hours or longer. However, the duration and intensity can vary based on the individual’s history of substance use. Psychological effects like depression may persist for weeks. At Cirque Lodge, our approach prioritizes ongoing care and support, recognizing that detox is only the first step.

Is Detox All That Is Needed to Overcome Addiction?

Detox alone is not sufficient to overcome addiction. It is the foundation for further treatment, which includes behavioral therapies and counseling. At Cirque Lodge, patients transition seamlessly from detox into our addiction treatment program, tailored to their unique needs.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Cirque Lodge Detox Facility

 
 Our detox program operates within the Studio, located at the entrance to Provo Canyon. This facility offers a warm, homelike environment with first-floor accommodations, including medical examination rooms, residential rooms, and a lounge. The nurse’s station is located next to the Detox Lounge, equipped with monitoring systems for immediate assistance.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Transition Into Treatment

 
 Cirque Lodge ensures a smooth transition from detox to treatment. During detox, patients are introduced to our facilities and programs. Our clinical team develops a personalized addiction treatment plan, and each patient is assigned a licensed therapist to oversee their recovery journey. Moving into the next phase of treatment is made easy and supportive, whether it involves shared accommodations at the Studio or transport to the Lodge in private vehicles.

 

 

 

 

Our Luxury Detox Facilities in Utah

Nestled in the breathtaking beauty of Sundance, Utah, Cirque Lodge provides a serene setting for recovery. Private and shared rooms with premium amenities, a world-class fitness center, and access to nature-based therapies create an environment that supports holistic healing. Activities such as equine therapy, hiking, and meditation are integral to our approach, fostering physical and emotional well-being.

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Our Admissions Process

At Cirque Lodge, we simplify the admissions process to reduce stress. Our admissions team is available 24/7 to guide you through each step. The process begins with a confidential phone assessment to evaluate the individual’s needs and determine the appropriate level of care.

Once treatment requirements are identified, we coordinate with patients and their families to ensure a smooth transition into our program. From the first call to arrival at our mountain luxury detox center, we strive to provide comfort, support, and clarity.

 
 
 
FAQs About Luxury Drug Rehab

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 What Makes a Detox Center Luxury?
 
 

 
The best luxury detox retreats offer high-end, personalized treatment services in a comfortable and serene environment.

Alongside expert medical and therapeutic care, luxury detox centers provide amenities and services typically found in luxury hotels, such as private rooms, world-class gyms, and gourmet meals. These amenities are all aimed at making the recovery process more comfortable.

 

 

 

 
 Are Luxury Detox Centers More Effective?
 
 

 
While the core treatment principles remain the same, luxury detox centers often provide a higher staff-to-client ratio, ensuring more personalized care.

In addition, the comfortable environment, holistic therapies, and high-end amenities may contribute to a more positive treatment experience, potentially improving outcomes. However, the effectiveness of any detox center, exceptional or otherwise, greatly depends on individual commitment and the quality of the services provided.

 

 

 

 
 How Long Does Detoxification Usually Take at a Luxury Detox Center?
 
 

 
Many of our clients start treatment wondering how long it takes to detox from alcohol at a exceptional medical detox facility like Cirque Lodge. The answer can vary based on several factors.

The length of the detox process depends on the type and severity of the substance use disorder, the individual’s physical health, and their response to treatment. Generally, the time it takes to detox the body from drugs at a exceptional detox center can last anywhere from a few days to a couple of weeks.

 

 

 

 
 What Types of Therapies Are Offered at Luxury Detox Centers?
 
 

 
Luxury detox centers like Cirque Lodge offer a wide range of therapies, from traditional options like individual and group therapy to holistic and experiential therapies such as art, music, and equine therapy. Nature-based activities and fitness programs are also commonly incorporated.

 

 

 

 
 Is Detox the Same as Treatment?
 
 

 
Detox is only the first step in the treatment process. It focuses on managing withdrawal symptoms and clearing the body of harmful substances. Comprehensive treatment involves therapy to address the underlying issues related to addiction, build coping skills, and prepare for long-term recovery.

 

 

 

 
 Are Luxury Detox Centers Private?
 
 

 
Luxury detox centers like Cirque Lodge prioritize the privacy and confidentiality of their clients. They often offer private rooms and ensure a discreet treatment experience.

 

 

 

 
 Do Luxury Detox Centers Accept Insurance?
 
 

 
When searching “luxury detox near me”, one of the most important criteria to narrow down is whether a facility accepts your insurance. Luckily, Cirque Lodge accepts insurance for our detox and treatment services. However, the extent of coverage depends on your specific insurance plan. Our admissions team can help verify your benefits and clarify your coverage details.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
Luxury Detox Centers: Drug and Alcohol Detoxification Program at Cirque Lodge

Recovery begins with a conversation.

A Safe Place to Heal and Recover

 

Our individualized treatment programs offer an enriching rehabilitation experience tailored to suit your needs. The breathtaking mountains surrounding our center are the perfect place to heal. Our magnificent location offers unique opportunities to reconnect with your true self and rediscover your love of life.

 

 
 More About Us 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

 
Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.

    <h1 class="twig-hero__title" id="what-to-bring-to-rehab">
        What to Bring to Rehab
        </h1>

</div>


<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    


<header class="section__header">
  

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="your-recovery-is-our-highest-priority">Your Recovery is Our Highest Priority</h2>




</header>


<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>At Cirque Lodge, your recovery is our highest priority. The following rules and recommendations ensure your stay is a safe, comfortable, and enriching experience.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>If you have any questions about what to bring with you to treatment, please call us on <a href="tel:800-582-0709">800-582-0709</a>, and one of our admissions team will be able to answer any questions you may have.</p>
</div>
</div>




</section>


<section class="section section--blockquote section--old-align-left section--default " >

				
		
    <div class="section__inner">      <blockquote class="blockquote">
    <p>Take these simple steps to begin the journey to recovery and freedom from addiction.</p>

      </blockquote>
    </div>
</section>


<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="things-to-bring">Things to Bring</h2>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>A credit card</strong>, cashier’s check, personal check, or wire transfers are an acceptable forms of payment. Please contact Admissions and make any necessary arrangements prior to your arrival. Payment is due in full upon admission.</li>



<li><strong>Credit card information</strong> to be on file for any incidental charges such as recovery books, logo wear, and salon services. Medication will be billed by a third-party pharmacy and they will need a card on file in order to fill any prescriptions. You will also be responsible for any co-pays or visits to the doctor. If necessary you may cash a personal check made out to Cirque Lodge for $100 one time during your stay. A pre-paid Visa or MasterCard will also work in lieu of personal credit card.</li>



<li><strong>Your driver’s license</strong>, passport, or photo ID.</li>



<li>A list of all your medications and dosages. Please bring a four-day supply to ensure you do not miss any medications during your transition. While in treatment, authorized medications will be distributed from a third-party pharmacy at an additional cost. If you have an advanced directive, please bring it with you.</li>



<li><strong>The names, addresses, and phone numbers</strong> of health care professionals, referents, family members and anyone else you would like to have involved in your treatment.</li>



<li><strong>Casual comfortable clothing</strong> that can be layered.</li>



<li><strong>Sleepwear</strong>.</li>



<li><strong>Shoes for everyday use</strong> and for exercise; a comfortable pair of hiking boots. Boots are available for purchase.</li>



<li>Workout attire, including gym attire.</li>



<li><strong>Shoes, shirts, and appropriate undergarments </strong>are required at all times. No tank tops, sleeveless tops. Dress codes are to be followed while in treatment.</li>



<li><strong>Personal toiletries</strong>, including shampoo and conditioner, hairspray, mouthwash, body lotion and sunscreen. All toiletries must be alcohol-free.</li>



<li><strong>Electronics</strong>: An alarm clock (without radio) and hairdryer. Headset radios, CD players (without speakers) and the following MP3 player models (no speakers) – AGPTEK A02 – AGPTEK A09X – AGPTEK A19X – AGPTEK A51PL – AGPTEK G02 – iPod Classics – iPod Shuffles</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="do-not-bring">Do Not Bring</h2>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Inappropriate Clothing:</strong> Drug or alcohol “logo” clothing, excessively tight-fitting clothes, low cut, sleeveless or revealing shirts, torn jeans or tee shirts; short-shorts (only shorts with a hem one inch above the knee may be worn)</li>



<li><strong>Items exceeding $500 in value.</strong> Cirque Lodge is not liable for the loss or damage of any money, jewelry, documents, or any other articles of unusual value. Cirque Lodge’s liability for the loss of any personal property deposited with the Cirque Lodge for safekeeping is limited to $500.</li>
</ul>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading" id="electrical-appliances">Electrical appliances:</h4>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Cellphone devices are not allowed at Studio location and will be stored.</li>



<li>Computer/Laptop/Tablet with internet access are not allowed at Studio location and will be stored.</li>



<li>iPods, Smart watches, I-Touches, any device that connects to Wi-Fi</li>
</ul>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading" id="cosmetics-that-contain-alcohol">Cosmetics that contain alcohol:</h4>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Hair sprays</li>



<li>Perfume</li>



<li>Nail polish remover, nail glue</li>



<li>Hair color chemicals</li>



<li>Aerosol containers</li>



<li>Aftershave, cologne</li>



<li>Alcohol-free cosmetics can be brought from home or purchased in our bookstore</li>
</ul>



<h4 class="wp-block-heading" id="other">Other:</h4>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Clove cigarettes or lighter butane cannot be stored on the premises.</li>



<li>Energy drinks or vitamin drinks.</li>



<li>Weapons of any kind.</li>



<li>Cirque Lodge is an abstinence based program. As such, all controlled substances, even if prescribed or legal, will be destroyed upon admission into the facility. </li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>




</section>

                                                                <div class="cta__text"><p>If you smoke you must bring sealed and packaged cartons. We do not sell cigarettes and strongly encourage you to address this addiction while in treatment. Smoking Cessation is available as part of the program.</p>

function loadDFlipAssets() {
    // Add CSS file
    const link = document.createElement("link");
    link.rel = "stylesheet";
    link.href = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/css/components/dflip.min.css";
    document.head.appendChild(link);

    // Add JS file
    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/js/components/dflip.min.js";
    script.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.remove('loading');
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').click();
        }, 2500);
    });
    document.body.appendChild(script);
}
if (document.querySelector('.dear-flip a'))
document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('href', '#');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('loading');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('_df_button');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf')
    loadDFlipAssets();
}, { once: true })

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    if (window.location.hash.startsWith('#button_pdf')) {
        const link = document.querySelector('.dear-flip a');
        if (link) {
            link.setAttribute('href', '#');
            link.classList.add('loading');
            link.classList.add('_df_button');
            link.setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf');
            loadDFlipAssets();
        }
    }
});
</script>

What to Bring to Rehab - Cirque Lodge 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 Treatment 
 
 

 
 
 Drug Rehab 

 
 Drug Detox 

 
 Dual Diagnosis 

 
 Rehab for Women 

 
 Chronic Relapse 

 
 Clinical Care 

 
 Codependency 

 
 Cognitive Therapy 

 
 Experiential Therapy 

 
 Level 7 Program 

 
 Trauma Therapy 

 
 Treatment FAQ 

 
 The Recovery Process 

 

 Addiction 
 
 

 
 
 Drug Addiction 

 
 Alcohol Addiction 

 
 Benzodiazepine Addiction 

 
 Cocaine Addiction 

 
 Heroin Addiction 

 
 Marijuana Addiction 

 
 Meth Addiction 

 
 Prescription Drug Addiction 

 
 Drug Addiction vs Drug Abuse 

 

 Facilities 
 
 

 
 
 Experience 

 
 The Lodge 

 
 The Studio 

 
 Gallery 

 

 Family 
 
 

 
 
 Family Intervention 

 
 Family Program 

 
 Family Week Schedule 

 
 What Family Can Expect 

 
 How to Help a Loved One 

 
 Signs of Drug Addiction 

 

 About Us 
 
 

 
 
 Alumni 

 
 Meet The Team 

 
 For Professionals 

 
 Luxury Drug Rehab 

 

 Testimonials 

 Admissions 
 
 

 
 
 Admission FAQ 

 
 Guidelines for Admission 

 
 Paying with insurance 

 
 Pre Arrival Checklist 

 
 Pre assessment 

 

 

 
 
 
 800-582-0709 
 Call Us 
 
 
 
 Help 
 Help is Waiting 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 Menu 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 What to Bring to Rehab
 

 

 
 

Your Recovery is Our Highest Priority

 

At Cirque Lodge, your recovery is our highest priority. The following rules and recommendations ensure your stay is a safe, comfortable, and enriching experience.

If you have any questions about what to bring with you to treatment, please call us on 800-582-0709 , and one of our admissions team will be able to answer any questions you may have.

 
 
 
 
 
Take these simple steps to begin the journey to recovery and freedom from addiction.

 
 

 

Things to Bring

 

 A credit card , cashier’s check, personal check, or wire transfers are an acceptable forms of payment. Please contact Admissions and make any necessary arrangements prior to your arrival. Payment is due in full upon admission.

 Credit card information to be on file for any incidental charges such as recovery books, logo wear, and salon services. Medication will be billed by a third-party pharmacy and they will need a card on file in order to fill any prescriptions. You will also be responsible for any co-pays or visits to the doctor. If necessary you may cash a personal check made out to Cirque Lodge for $100 one time during your stay. A pre-paid Visa or MasterCard will also work in lieu of personal credit card.

 Your driver’s license , passport, or photo ID.

A list of all your medications and dosages. Please bring a four-day supply to ensure you do not miss any medications during your transition. While in treatment, authorized medications will be distributed from a third-party pharmacy at an additional cost. If you have an advanced directive, please bring it with you.

 The names, addresses, and phone numbers of health care professionals, referents, family members and anyone else you would like to have involved in your treatment.

 Casual comfortable clothing that can be layered.

 Sleepwear .

 Shoes for everyday use and for exercise; a comfortable pair of hiking boots. Boots are available for purchase.

Workout attire, including gym attire.

 Shoes, shirts, and appropriate undergarments are required at all times. No tank tops, sleeveless tops. Dress codes are to be followed while in treatment.

 Personal toiletries , including shampoo and conditioner, hairspray, mouthwash, body lotion and sunscreen. All toiletries must be alcohol-free.

 Electronics : An alarm clock (without radio) and hairdryer. Headset radios, CD players (without speakers) and the following MP3 player models (no speakers) – AGPTEK A02 – AGPTEK A09X – AGPTEK A19X – AGPTEK A51PL – AGPTEK G02 – iPod Classics – iPod Shuffles

 

Do Not Bring

 

 Inappropriate Clothing: Drug or alcohol “logo” clothing, excessively tight-fitting clothes, low cut, sleeveless or revealing shirts, torn jeans or tee shirts; short-shorts (only shorts with a hem one inch above the knee may be worn)

 Items exceeding $500 in value. Cirque Lodge is not liable for the loss or damage of any money, jewelry, documents, or any other articles of unusual value. Cirque Lodge’s liability for the loss of any personal property deposited with the Cirque Lodge for safekeeping is limited to $500.

 

Electrical appliances:

 

Cellphone devices are not allowed at Studio location and will be stored.

Computer/Laptop/Tablet with internet access are not allowed at Studio location and will be stored.

iPods, Smart watches, I-Touches, any device that connects to Wi-Fi

 

Cosmetics that contain alcohol:

 

Hair sprays

Perfume

Nail polish remover, nail glue

Hair color chemicals

Aerosol containers

Aftershave, cologne

Alcohol-free cosmetics can be brought from home or purchased in our bookstore

 

Other:

 

Clove cigarettes or lighter butane cannot be stored on the premises.

Energy drinks or vitamin drinks.

Weapons of any kind.

Cirque Lodge is an abstinence based program. As such, all controlled substances, even if prescribed or legal, will be destroyed upon admission into the facility. 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Laundry facilities, detergent, iron and ironing board are provided at no additional cost.

 

If you smoke you must bring sealed and packaged cartons. We do not sell cigarettes and strongly encourage you to address this addiction while in treatment. Smoking Cessation is available as part of the program.

 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
Have any questions?

 

 
 
Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.

 Name * 

 Phone * 

 Email * 

 Preferred contact Preferred contact Email Phone 

 Message * 

 URL 

 
 

 SUBMIT 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 info@cirquelodge.com 
 
 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Lodge 
 3114 E Ida's Rd, Sundance, UT 84604 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Studio 
 777 N Palisade Dr, Orem, UT 84097 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 
 Opening Hours 
 24 Hours 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
Phone

 
(800) 582-0709

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Email

 
info@cirquelodge.com

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Address

 
777 N Palisade Drive

Orem, UT 84097

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
Opening Hours

 
24 Hours

 
 
 
-->
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
A Safe Place to Heal and Recover

 

Our individualized treatment programs offer an enriching rehabilitation experience tailored to suit your needs. The breathtaking mountains surrounding our center are the perfect place to heal. Our magnificent location offers unique opportunities to reconnect with your true self and rediscover your love of life.

 

 
 More About Us 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

 
Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 info@cirquelodge.com 
 
 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Lodge 
 3114 E Ida's Rd, Sundance, UT 84604 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Studio 
 777 N Palisade Dr, Orem, UT 84097 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 Blog 

 About Us 

 Contact Us 

 Digital brochure 

 Employment Opportunities 

 Sitemap 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
Recovery, It’s In Our Nature!

 
We support patients from all over the USA. For example, from: 
 Salt Lake City ,
 Provo ,
 California ,
 Los Angeles ,
 Florida ,
 Orange County ,
 New York ,
 Georgia ,
 Colorado ,
 Texas ,
 San Francisco ,
 Arizona ,
 West Palm Beach 
 

 

 

 

 

Connect With Us

    <h1 class="twig-hero__title" id="admissions">
        Admissions
        </h1>

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    


<header class="section__header">
  

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="admissions-overview">Admissions Overview</h2>




</header>


<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>Surrounded by the spectacular Rocky Mountains, Cirque Lodge combines <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/cognitive-therapy/">behavioral therapy</a>, <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/experiential-therapy/">experiential therapy</a>, and support programs to help you rediscover what you love in life and guide you to lifelong recovery.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>If you or your loved one is suffering from a drug or alcohol addiction, please contact us as soon as possible. Our compassionate admissions team is here to help guide you through the rehab admission process and answer any questions you might have.</p>
</div>
</div>




</section>


<section class="section section--blockquote section--old-align-left section--default " >

				
		
    <div class="section__inner">      <blockquote class="blockquote">
    <p>Take these simple steps to begin the journey to recovery and freedom from addiction.</p>

      </blockquote>
    </div>
</section>


<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow"><picture class="image__picture">
        
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-2-Home-and-Garden-800x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 1440px)"/>

    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-2-Home-and-Garden-400x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 767px)" />

    <img decoding="async" class="image__picture-image" src="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-2-Home-and-Garden-320x0-c-default.webp" width="320" height="304" alt="Picture 2 Home and Garden" loading="lazy" />
</picture></div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="receive-the-help-you-deserve">Receive the Help You Deserve</h2>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we make your journey to our addiction center as easy and relaxing as possible. Our staff will help you navigate through the admission process. Once you decide on an admission date and fly into our local airport, our staff will handle your transportation to our facility.</p>



<p>Once you arrive at our facility, we will make sure you are comfortable and have everything you need. When you are ready, our medically trained professionals will guide you through the start of your addiction treatment program.</p>



<p>For information on what to bring with you to the center, please give us a call or read through the <a href="/admissions/pre-arrival-checklist/" rel="noreferrer">Pre-Arrival Checklist</a> and <a href="/admissions/things-to-bring/" rel="noreferrer">What to Bring Guide</a> here.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="/admissions/things-to-bring/">What To Bring</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>




</section>

<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="take-a-confidential-assessment">Take a Confidential Assessment</h2>



<p>One of our professionals will take you through a confidential assessment to understand what kind of <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/">treatment program</a> you need. Our conversation will be simple, relaxed, and entirely confidential.</p>



<p>We can answer any questions you may have about our drug and alcohol rehab, medically supervised detox and our dual diagnosis program. We can discuss which of our world-class treatment facilities will work best for you.</p>



<p>If needed, we will direct you to other resources to help and support you in your recovery.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="https://forms.cirquelodge.com/assessment/">Confidential Assessment</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>




</section>

</picture></div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="contact-our-admissions-team">Contact Our Admissions Team</h2>



<p>When you or a loved one struggles with an alcohol or drug addiction, making the first phone call to ask for help is often the most challenging part of recovery.</p>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we make this step as easy and comfortable for you as possible. Our admissions counselors are compassionate, experienced, and non-judgmental.</p>



<p>We understand the anxiety and worry you may be experiencing. We are here to help ease your fears, answer your questions, and start your journey to lifelong recovery.</p>



<p>If you call for a loved one, we will provide advice and support on how you can help them begin their healing process.</p>



<p>Please contact our admissions team by calling <a href="tel:8005820709">800-582-0709</a> or filling in our online form.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="/contact/">Contact Us</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>




</section>

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="admissions-assessment">Admissions Assessment</h2>



<p>In the past few decades, scientists and medical professionals have done extensive research into the science of addiction. Psychologists, therapists, neuroscientists, and addiction specialists have explored the causes of addiction and the best treatment methods.</p>



<p>We use mental and physical assessments to gain a comprehensive understanding of your addiction and design the most effective treatment plan for you. At Cirque Lodge, our medical professionals can use this insight to offer the most accurate and up-to-date treatment available.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="confidential-and-compassionate">Confidential and Compassionate</h2>



<p>We understand that talking about your addiction can be difficult, especially in the first stages of recovery. We can assure you that our assessments are conducted with compassion and without judgment. We want to make the process as easy as possible for you.</p>



<p>Any information you share will be kept entirely confidential.</p>
</div>
</div>




</section>

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow"><picture class="image__picture">
        
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-5-Helping-Hands-800x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 1440px)"/>
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-5-Helping-Hands-600x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 1024px)"/>
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-5-Helping-Hands-400x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 767px)" />
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-5-Helping-Hands-600x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 400px)" />

    <img decoding="async" class="image__picture-image" src="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Picture-5-Helping-Hands-320x0-c-default.webp" width="320" height="239" alt="Picture 5 Helping Hands" loading="lazy" />
</picture></div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="mental-assessment">Mental Assessment</h2>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we provide a range of mental assessments to gain the best possible insight into your addiction. These include:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Psychological testing</li>



<li>Neuropsychological testing</li>



<li>Cognitive testing</li>



<li>Personality testing</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>




</section>

<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    

<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="psychological-testing">Psychological Testing</h2>



<p>The purpose of psychological testing is to identify any co-occurring disorders you have that may contribute to your addiction. These may include depression, anxiety, and panic disorders.</p>



<p>While neuropsychological testing focuses specifically on the effect drug abuse has had on your brain, psychological testing gives a broader overview of emotional or behavioral disorders.</p>



<p>While neuropsychological testing focuses specifically on the effect drug abuse has had on your brain, psychological testing gives a broader overview of emotional or behavioral disorders.</p>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we use a variety of different psychological tests in our assessments. These include:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Structured clinical interview for DSM-V</li>



<li>Personality Assessment Inventory</li>



<li>Mini-International Neuropsychiatric Interview</li>



<li>Millon Clinical Multiaxial Inventory-III</li>



<li>Minnesota Multiphasic Personality Inventory (MMPI)</li>
</ul>



<p>Diagnosing co-occurring disorders is an essential part of our assessment process. <a href="https://www.samhsa.gov/data/sites/default/files/NSDUH-FFR1-2016/NSDUH-FFR1-2016.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">SAMSHA’s </a>research finds that almost half of people with a substance use disorder have a co-occurring disorder.</p>



<p>Co-occurring disorders are often the underlying cause of substance use. If left untreated, the same patterns may re-trigger substance abuse and addiction even after an initial recovery.</p>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we treat co-occurring disorders in our dual diagnosis program. This provides you with a complete healing process where you recover from the disorders that underlie your addiction. Diagnosis through psychological testing is the first stage of this process.</p>





<p>Psychological testing also helps us identify and address interpersonal and intrapersonal issues that could affect your recovery.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="addiction-assessment">Addiction Assessment</h2>



<p>Addiction testing assesses the extent of your addiction to drugs or alcohol. We will ask you how many units you are drinking or how many drugs you are using. This helps us to design the most effective treatment plan for you.</p>





<p>We also review your existing prescriptions and diagnoses to offer the appropriate level of care throughout your time at the center. This information is particularly important for your treatment during the detoxification process.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="neuropsychological-testing">Neuropsychological Testing</h2>



<p>Neuropsychological testing assesses the effect drug use has had on your brain. It informs us which mental skills your addiction has impacted the most and which ones may still function well.</p>



<p>During the assessment, a team member will ask you to answer several questions verbally and repeat specific sentences or phrases back to them. They will also give you a sheet of written questions to answer. We may also ask you to move around or perform specific actions in a particular order.</p>



<p>The results of these tests will give us in-depth information about your mental skills, including:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Cognition and emotional health</li>



<li>Executive functioning</li>



<li>Working memory function</li>



<li>Attention</li>



<li>Language skills</li>



<li>Motor coordination</li>



<li>Memory</li>
</ul>





<p>Our analysts then compare your results to other people who have a similar background and history to yourself. This gives us a clearer picture of the extent to which your addiction has affected your brain. We use this information to design the most accurate and beneficial treatment plan for you.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="physical-health-assessment">Physical Health Assessment</h2>



<p>During physical health assessments, we measure the physical effects of drug abuse and addiction on your body. We test for certain diseases that may have resulted from the addiction. <a href="https://www.drugabuse.gov/publications/principles-drug-addiction-treatment-research-based-guide-third-edition/principles-effective-treatment" target="_blank" rel="noopener">The National Institute of Drug Abuse</a> lists physical testing as a principle of effective treatment.</p>



<p>Our standard tests include:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Hepatitis C and HIV blood tests</li>



<li>Liver function test</li>
</ul>





<p>Physical testing allows us to pinpoint any physical conditions that might require treatment during your time at Cirque Lodge or afterward. Our team will incorporate this into your inpatient treatment and aftercare programs.</p>
</div>
</div>




</section></div></div>

<script id='script-67bdc57539a1a-js' type='text/javascript'>
var option_button_pdf = {
    source:'https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Brochure-for-Website-compressed-1-1-1-1.pdf',
    webgl:true,
};

function loadDFlipAssets() {
    // Add CSS file
    const link = document.createElement("link");
    link.rel = "stylesheet";
    link.href = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/css/components/dflip.min.css";
    document.head.appendChild(link);

    // Add JS file
    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/js/components/dflip.min.js";
    script.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.remove('loading');
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').click();
        }, 2500);
    });
    document.body.appendChild(script);
}
if (document.querySelector('.dear-flip a'))
document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('href', '#');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('loading');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('_df_button');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf')
    loadDFlipAssets();
}, { once: true })

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    if (window.location.hash.startsWith('#button_pdf')) {
        const link = document.querySelector('.dear-flip a');
        if (link) {
            link.setAttribute('href', '#');
            link.classList.add('loading');
            link.classList.add('_df_button');
            link.setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf');
            loadDFlipAssets();
        }
    }
});
</script>

Admissions - Cirque Lodge

 Addiction

 Benzodiazepine Addiction 

 
 Cocaine Addiction 

 
 Heroin Addiction 

 
 Marijuana Addiction 

 
 Meth Addiction 

 
 Prescription Drug Addiction 

 
 Drug Addiction vs Drug Abuse 

 

 Facilities 
 
 

 
 
 Experience 

 
 The Lodge 

 
 The Studio 

 
 Gallery 

 

 Family 
 
 

 
 
 Family Intervention 

 
 Family Program 

 
 Family Week Schedule 

 
 What Family Can Expect 

 
 How to Help a Loved One 

 
 Signs of Drug Addiction 

 

 About Us 
 
 

 
 
 Alumni 

 
 Meet The Team 

 
 For Professionals 

 
 Luxury Drug Rehab 

 

 Testimonials 

 Admissions 
 
 

 
 
 Admission FAQ 

 
 Guidelines for Admission 

 
 Paying with insurance 

 
 Pre Arrival Checklist 

 
 Pre assessment 

 

 

 
 
 
 800-582-0709 
 Call Us 
 
 
 
 Help 
 Help is Waiting 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 Menu 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Admissions
 

 

 
 

Admissions Overview

 

Surrounded by the spectacular Rocky Mountains, Cirque Lodge combines behavioral therapy , experiential therapy , and support programs to help you rediscover what you love in life and guide you to lifelong recovery.

If you or your loved one is suffering from a drug or alcohol addiction, please contact us as soon as possible. Our compassionate admissions team is here to help guide you through the rehab admission process and answer any questions you might have.

 
 
 
 
 
Take these simple steps to begin the journey to recovery and freedom from addiction.

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Receive the Help You Deserve

At Cirque Lodge, we make your journey to our addiction center as easy and relaxing as possible. Our staff will help you navigate through the admission process. Once you decide on an admission date and fly into our local airport, our staff will handle your transportation to our facility.

Once you arrive at our facility, we will make sure you are comfortable and have everything you need. When you are ready, our medically trained professionals will guide you through the start of your addiction treatment program.

For information on what to bring with you to the center, please give us a call or read through the Pre-Arrival Checklist and What to Bring Guide here.

 What To Bring 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Take a Confidential Assessment

One of our professionals will take you through a confidential assessment to understand what kind of treatment program you need. Our conversation will be simple, relaxed, and entirely confidential.

We can answer any questions you may have about our drug and alcohol rehab, medically supervised detox and our dual diagnosis program. We can discuss which of our world-class treatment facilities will work best for you.

If needed, we will direct you to other resources to help and support you in your recovery.

 Confidential Assessment 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Contact Our Admissions Team

When you or a loved one struggles with an alcohol or drug addiction, making the first phone call to ask for help is often the most challenging part of recovery.

At Cirque Lodge, we make this step as easy and comfortable for you as possible. Our admissions counselors are compassionate, experienced, and non-judgmental.

We understand the anxiety and worry you may be experiencing. We are here to help ease your fears, answer your questions, and start your journey to lifelong recovery.

If you call for a loved one, we will provide advice and support on how you can help them begin their healing process.

Please contact our admissions team by calling 800-582-0709 or filling in our online form.

 Contact Us 

 

Admissions Assessment

In the past few decades, scientists and medical professionals have done extensive research into the science of addiction. Psychologists, therapists, neuroscientists, and addiction specialists have explored the causes of addiction and the best treatment methods.

We use mental and physical assessments to gain a comprehensive understanding of your addiction and design the most effective treatment plan for you. At Cirque Lodge, our medical professionals can use this insight to offer the most accurate and up-to-date treatment available.

Confidential and Compassionate

We understand that talking about your addiction can be difficult, especially in the first stages of recovery. We can assure you that our assessments are conducted with compassion and without judgment. We want to make the process as easy as possible for you.

Any information you share will be kept entirely confidential.

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Mental Assessment

At Cirque Lodge, we provide a range of mental assessments to gain the best possible insight into your addiction. These include:

 

Psychological testing

Neuropsychological testing

Cognitive testing

Personality testing

 

 

Psychological Testing

The purpose of psychological testing is to identify any co-occurring disorders you have that may contribute to your addiction. These may include depression, anxiety, and panic disorders.

While neuropsychological testing focuses specifically on the effect drug abuse has had on your brain, psychological testing gives a broader overview of emotional or behavioral disorders.

While neuropsychological testing focuses specifically on the effect drug abuse has had on your brain, psychological testing gives a broader overview of emotional or behavioral disorders.

At Cirque Lodge, we use a variety of different psychological tests in our assessments. These include:

 

Structured clinical interview for DSM-V

Personality Assessment Inventory

Mini-International Neuropsychiatric Interview

Millon Clinical Multiaxial Inventory-III

Minnesota Multiphasic Personality Inventory (MMPI)

 

Diagnosing co-occurring disorders is an essential part of our assessment process. SAMSHA’s research finds that almost half of people with a substance use disorder have a co-occurring disorder.

Co-occurring disorders are often the underlying cause of substance use. If left untreated, the same patterns may re-trigger substance abuse and addiction even after an initial recovery.

At Cirque Lodge, we treat co-occurring disorders in our dual diagnosis program. This provides you with a complete healing process where you recover from the disorders that underlie your addiction. Diagnosis through psychological testing is the first stage of this process.

Psychological testing also helps us identify and address interpersonal and intrapersonal issues that could affect your recovery.

Addiction Assessment

Addiction testing assesses the extent of your addiction to drugs or alcohol. We will ask you how many units you are drinking or how many drugs you are using. This helps us to design the most effective treatment plan for you.

We also review your existing prescriptions and diagnoses to offer the appropriate level of care throughout your time at the center. This information is particularly important for your treatment during the detoxification process.

Neuropsychological Testing

Neuropsychological testing assesses the effect drug use has had on your brain. It informs us which mental skills your addiction has impacted the most and which ones may still function well.

During the assessment, a team member will ask you to answer several questions verbally and repeat specific sentences or phrases back to them. They will also give you a sheet of written questions to answer. We may also ask you to move around or perform specific actions in a particular order.

The results of these tests will give us in-depth information about your mental skills, including:

 

Cognition and emotional health

Executive functioning

Working memory function

Attention

Language skills

Motor coordination

Memory

 

Our analysts then compare your results to other people who have a similar background and history to yourself. This gives us a clearer picture of the extent to which your addiction has affected your brain. We use this information to design the most accurate and beneficial treatment plan for you.

Physical Health Assessment

During physical health assessments, we measure the physical effects of drug abuse and addiction on your body. We test for certain diseases that may have resulted from the addiction. The National Institute of Drug Abuse lists physical testing as a principle of effective treatment.

Our standard tests include:

 

Hepatitis C and HIV blood tests

Liver function test

 

Physical testing allows us to pinpoint any physical conditions that might require treatment during your time at Cirque Lodge or afterward. Our team will incorporate this into your inpatient treatment and aftercare programs.

 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
Have any questions?

 

 
 
Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.

 Name * 

 Phone * 

 Email * 

 Preferred contact Preferred contact Email Phone 

 Message * 

 URL 

 
 

 SUBMIT 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 info@cirquelodge.com 
 
 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Lodge 
 3114 E Ida's Rd, Sundance, UT 84604 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Studio 
 777 N Palisade Dr, Orem, UT 84097 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 
 

 
 Opening Hours 
 24 Hours 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
Phone

 
(800) 582-0709

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Email

 
info@cirquelodge.com

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Address

 
777 N Palisade Drive

Orem, UT 84097

 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
Opening Hours

 
24 Hours

 
 
 
-->
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
A Safe Place to Heal and Recover

 

Our individualized treatment programs offer an enriching rehabilitation experience tailored to suit your needs. The breathtaking mountains surrounding our center are the perfect place to heal. Our magnificent location offers unique opportunities to reconnect with your true self and rediscover your love of life.

 

 
 More About Us 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

 
Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.

 

 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 info@cirquelodge.com 
 
 

 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Lodge 
 3114 E Ida's Rd, Sundance, UT 84604 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 The Studio 
 777 N Palisade Dr, Orem, UT 84097 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 Blog

 Sitemap 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 
Recovery, It’s In Our Nature!

 
We support patients from all over the USA. For example, from: 
 Salt Lake City ,
 Provo ,

    <h1 class="twig-hero__title">
        Clinical Care
        </h1>
