<div class="content-wrapper">
            <div class="content-wrapper__inner">
        <div class="bv-theme-breadcrumb" typeof="BreadcrumbList" vocab="https://schema.org/"><span property="itemListElement" typeof="ListItem"><a property="item" typeof="WebPage" title="Go to Cirque Lodge." href="https://www.cirquelodge.com" class="home" ><span property="name">Cirque Lodge</span></a><meta property="position" content="1"></span> > <span property="itemListElement" typeof="ListItem"><a property="item" typeof="WebPage" title="Go to Treatment." href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/" class="post post-page" ><span property="name">Treatment</span></a><meta property="position" content="2"></span> > <span property="itemListElement" typeof="ListItem"><span property="name" class="post post-page current-item">Clinical Care</span><meta property="url" content="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/clinical-care/"><meta property="position" content="3"></span></div></div></div>  <div class="bv-theme-content-wrapper bv-theme-content-wrapper--with-aside"><div class="bv-theme-content-wrapper__content">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading h2" id="clinical-care-at-cirque-lodge">Clinical Care at Cirque Lodge</h2>



<p><strong>At Cirque Lodge, we offer a transformative approach to addiction recovery, providing unparalleled clinical care for individuals struggling with drug or alcohol addiction.</strong></p>



<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>Situated in the serene beauty of the mountains, our private facility is more than a treatment center, it’s a sanctuary for healing. We combine evidence-based therapies, compassionate support, and innovative techniques to help clients reclaim their lives, restore balance, and achieve lasting wellness.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading" id="our-dedicated-clinical-team">Our Dedicated Clinical Team</h3>



<p>The foundation of our care is our exceptional team of professionals, which includes:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Addiction specialists</li>



<li>Licensed therapists and counselors</li>



<li>Physicians and nurses</li>



<li>Board-certified psychiatrist</li>
</ul>



<p>With decades of experience, our team employs the latest evidence-based practices and a personalized, <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/clinical-care/holistic-therapy/">holistic approach</a> to ensure the highest quality care.</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h3 class="wp-block-heading" id="comprehensive-and-customized-treatment">Comprehensive and Customized Treatment</h3>



<p>At Cirque Lodge, we understand that no two recovery journeys are the same. Through in-depth psychological testing and assessments, we identify the unique factors contributing to each client’s addiction and co-occurring conditions, such as:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Trauma</li>



<li>Mood disorders</li>



<li>Personality disorders</li>
</ul>



<p>This personalized approach allows us to design treatment plans tailored to meet your specific needs, ensuring a holistic recovery experience that addresses the mind, body, and spirit.</p>
</div>
</div>




<div class="child-slider">
<aside>
    <div class="child-slider__menu" id="acf-toc">
        <div class="child-slider__menu-title">Jump To section</div>

                <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/Why-Choose-Cirque-Lodge-for-Clinical-Care-320x700-c-center.webp" media="(min-width: 768px)" >

                <img decoding="async" class="child-slider__item-picture-image" src="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/Why-Choose-Cirque-Lodge-for-Clinical-Care-360x400-c-center.webp" alt="Why Choose Cirque Lodge for Clinical Care?" width="360" height="400" loading="lazy" />
            </picture>
        </div>
        <div class="child-slider__item-text">
            <h3 id="why-choose-cirque-lodge-for-clinical-care">Why Choose Cirque Lodge for Clinical Care?</h3>
            <p>Your well-being is at the heart of everything we do. At Cirque Lodge, we blend clinical expertise with compassionate care, offering comprehensive treatment programs that foster lasting recovery. Here’s what sets us apart:</p>
<p><strong>Key Features of Clinical Care at Cirque Lodge</strong></p>
<p><strong>24/7 Medically Assisted Detox</strong></p>
<p><a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/benzodiazepines/medically-assisted-detox-can-help-with-benzodiazepine-addiction/">Detox</a> is the critical first step in recovery. At Cirque Lodge, we provide round-the-clock supervision, ensuring safety and comfort during withdrawal. Our medical team utilizes FDA-approved medications to ease symptoms, preparing you physically and mentally for the next phase of treatment.</p>
<p><strong>Personalized Treatment Programs</strong></p>
<p>Addiction affects everyone differently, and our programs reflect this diversity. We address co-occurring mental and physical health conditions with precision, ensuring comprehensive and individualized care throughout the recovery process.</p>
<p><strong>Comprehensive Testing and Assessments</strong></p>
<p>Using tests and assessments, we gain a complete understanding of your condition. These assessments allow us to craft a treatment plan uniquely suited to your challenges and goals.</p>
<p><strong>Evidence-Based Treatment Modalities</strong></p>
<p>We employ proven therapies, including Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) to address the root causes of addiction and promote emotional resilience. Our approach ensures clients receive the most effective treatment available.</p>
<p><strong>Holistic and Experiential Therapies</strong></p>
<p>True healing goes beyond traditional therapy. Our <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/clinical-care/holistic-therapy/">experiential therapies</a>, set against the backdrop of the stunning Utah Rocky Mountains, include activities like hiking, climbing, and equine therapy. These activities foster self-discovery, connection, and personal growth.</p>
<p><strong>Individual and Group Therapy Sessions</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Individual Therapy: One-on-one sessions provide a safe, confidential space to explore thoughts and behaviors, using methods like CBT to encourage lasting change.</li>
<li>Group Therapy: Shared experiences in group settings foster mutual understanding and support.</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Family Therapy</strong></p>
<p>Addiction affects the entire family. By addressing dynamics and fostering open communication, family therapy helps rebuild trust and strengthen relationships.</p>
<p><strong>Workshops</strong></p>
<p>Knowledge is power. Through workshop sessions, clients learn about the science of addiction and strategies for recovery. For those staying over 30 days, <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/clinical-care/intensive-recovery-workshops/">intensive workshops</a> delve into deeper issues like trauma, grief, and interpersonal relationships, facilitating profound personal growth.</p>
<p><strong>Relapse Prevention Planning</strong></p>
<p>Recovery is a lifelong journey. We provide clients with detailed relapse prevention plans and connect them to post-treatment support networks, ensuring ongoing success after leaving Cirque Lodge.</p>
<p><strong>A Healing Haven in the Utah Rockies</strong></p>
<p>Cirque Lodge’s breathtaking location in the Utah Rocky Mountains offers a peaceful retreat for recovery. Here, clients find comfort, safety, and inspiration as they embark on their journey to wellness.</p>

        </div>
        </div>

            </picture>
        </div>
        <div class="child-slider__item-text">
            <h3 id="transform-your-life-at-cirque-lodge">Transform Your Life at Cirque Lodge</h3>
            <p data-pm-slice="1 1 []">At Cirque Lodge, we’ve witnessed the devastating effects of addiction—but we’ve also seen the remarkable transformations that recovery brings. We’ve watched individuals rediscover hope, families reunite, and lives rebuilt with renewed purpose.</p>
<p>Take the first step toward lasting change. At Cirque Lodge, you’ll find expert care, compassionate support, and serene environment needed to heal and thrive.</p>

}
if (document.querySelector('.dear-flip a'))
document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('href', '#');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('loading');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('_df_button');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf')
    loadDFlipAssets();
}, { once: true })

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    if (window.location.hash.startsWith('#button_pdf')) {
        const link = document.querySelector('.dear-flip a');
        if (link) {
            link.setAttribute('href', '#');
            link.classList.add('loading');
            link.classList.add('_df_button');
            link.setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf');
            loadDFlipAssets();
        }
    }
});
</script>

 Clinical Care
 

 

 
 Cirque Lodge > Treatment > Clinical Care 

 

Clinical Care at Cirque Lodge

 At Cirque Lodge, we offer a transformative approach to addiction recovery, providing unparalleled clinical care for individuals struggling with drug or alcohol addiction. 

Situated in the serene beauty of the mountains, our private facility is more than a treatment center, it’s a sanctuary for healing. We combine evidence-based therapies, compassionate support, and innovative techniques to help clients reclaim their lives, restore balance, and achieve lasting wellness.

Our Dedicated Clinical Team

The foundation of our care is our exceptional team of professionals, which includes:

 

Addiction specialists

Licensed therapists and counselors

Physicians and nurses

Board-certified psychiatrist

 

With decades of experience, our team employs the latest evidence-based practices and a personalized, holistic approach to ensure the highest quality care.

Comprehensive and Customized Treatment

At Cirque Lodge, we understand that no two recovery journeys are the same. Through in-depth psychological testing and assessments, we identify the unique factors contributing to each client’s addiction and co-occurring conditions, such as:

 

Trauma

Mood disorders

Personality disorders

 

This personalized approach allows us to design treatment plans tailored to meet your specific needs, ensuring a holistic recovery experience that addresses the mind, body, and spirit.

 
 

 
Jump To section

 

 
 
 

 Why Choose Cirque Lodge for Clinical Care? 
 
 
 

 Transform Your Life at Cirque Lodge 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Why Choose Cirque Lodge for Clinical Care?

 
Your well-being is at the heart of everything we do. At Cirque Lodge, we blend clinical expertise with compassionate care, offering comprehensive treatment programs that foster lasting recovery. Here’s what sets us apart:

 Key Features of Clinical Care at Cirque Lodge 

 24/7 Medically Assisted Detox 

 Detox is the critical first step in recovery. At Cirque Lodge, we provide round-the-clock supervision, ensuring safety and comfort during withdrawal. Our medical team utilizes FDA-approved medications to ease symptoms, preparing you physically and mentally for the next phase of treatment.

 Personalized Treatment Programs 

Addiction affects everyone differently, and our programs reflect this diversity. We address co-occurring mental and physical health conditions with precision, ensuring comprehensive and individualized care throughout the recovery process.

 Comprehensive Testing and Assessments 

Using tests and assessments, we gain a complete understanding of your condition. These assessments allow us to craft a treatment plan uniquely suited to your challenges and goals.

 Evidence-Based Treatment Modalities 

We employ proven therapies, including Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) to address the root causes of addiction and promote emotional resilience. Our approach ensures clients receive the most effective treatment available.

 Holistic and Experiential Therapies 

True healing goes beyond traditional therapy. Our experiential therapies , set against the backdrop of the stunning Utah Rocky Mountains, include activities like hiking, climbing, and equine therapy. These activities foster self-discovery, connection, and personal growth.

 Individual and Group Therapy Sessions 

 

Individual Therapy: One-on-one sessions provide a safe, confidential space to explore thoughts and behaviors, using methods like CBT to encourage lasting change.

Group Therapy: Shared experiences in group settings foster mutual understanding and support.

 

 Family Therapy 

Addiction affects the entire family. By addressing dynamics and fostering open communication, family therapy helps rebuild trust and strengthen relationships.

 Workshops 

Knowledge is power. Through workshop sessions, clients learn about the science of addiction and strategies for recovery. For those staying over 30 days, intensive workshops delve into deeper issues like trauma, grief, and interpersonal relationships, facilitating profound personal growth.

 Relapse Prevention Planning 

Recovery is a lifelong journey. We provide clients with detailed relapse prevention plans and connect them to post-treatment support networks, ensuring ongoing success after leaving Cirque Lodge.

 A Healing Haven in the Utah Rockies 

Cirque Lodge’s breathtaking location in the Utah Rocky Mountains offers a peaceful retreat for recovery. Here, clients find comfort, safety, and inspiration as they embark on their journey to wellness.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Transform Your Life at Cirque Lodge

 
At Cirque Lodge, we’ve witnessed the devastating effects of addiction—but we’ve also seen the remarkable transformations that recovery brings. We’ve watched individuals rediscover hope, families reunite, and lives rebuilt with renewed purpose.

Take the first step toward lasting change. At Cirque Lodge, you’ll find expert care, compassionate support, and serene environment needed to heal and thrive.

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Your Journey To Recovery Begins Today

 

 
 (800) 582-0709 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 
 

 
Clinical Care

 
 Holistic Therapy 

 Intensive Recovery Workshops 

 Psychological Testing 

 Medically Assisted Detoxification 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
Talk with our specialist now

 
Recovery begins with a conversation.

 (800) 582-0709

A Safe Place to Heal and Recover

 

Our individualized treatment programs offer an enriching rehabilitation experience tailored to suit your needs. The breathtaking mountains surrounding our center are the perfect place to heal. Our magnificent location offers unique opportunities to reconnect with your true self and rediscover your love of life.

 

 
 More About Us 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

 
Cirque Lodge is considered among our colleagues, as one of, if not the premium drug and alcohol rehab facility in the country.

Recovery, It’s In Our Nature!

 
We support patients from all over the USA. For example, from: 
 Salt Lake City ,
 Provo ,
 California ,
 Los Angeles ,
 Florida ,
 Orange County ,
 New York ,
 Georgia ,
 Colorado ,
 Texas ,
 San Francisco ,
 Arizona ,
 West Palm Beach

    <h1 class="twig-hero__title">
        Family Program
        </h1>

</div>
<div class="content-wrapper">
            <div class="content-wrapper__inner">
        <div class="bv-theme-breadcrumb" typeof="BreadcrumbList" vocab="https://schema.org/"><span property="itemListElement" typeof="ListItem"><a property="item" typeof="WebPage" title="Go to Cirque Lodge." href="https://www.cirquelodge.com" class="home" ><span property="name">Cirque Lodge</span></a><meta property="position" content="1"></span> > <span property="itemListElement" typeof="ListItem"><a property="item" typeof="WebPage" title="Go to Family." href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/family/" class="post post-page" ><span property="name">Family</span></a><meta property="position" content="2"></span> > <span property="itemListElement" typeof="ListItem"><span property="name" class="post post-page current-item">Family Program</span><meta property="url" content="https://www.cirquelodge.com/family/program/"><meta property="position" content="3"></span></div></div></div>  <div class="bv-theme-content-wrapper bv-theme-content-wrapper--with-aside"><div class="bv-theme-content-wrapper__content">
<h2 class="h2 wp-block-heading" id="family-program-multi-systemic-drug-and-alcohol-rehab">Family Program – Multi-Systemic Drug and Alcohol Rehab</h2>



<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>To facilitate and enhance the healing process, Cirque Lodge involves family members and loved ones in the treatment of residents.</p>



<p>Family involvement is both an effective and integral part to the drug and <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/alcohol-rehab/">alcohol rehab</a> center, as well as the recovery process.</p>



<p>Family involvement takes place in several areas,we involve the families prior to admission by collecting information about their loved ones history .</p>



<p>Secondly, families can be and often are involved in weekly therapy sessions with their loved one, facilitated by their master-level therapist.</p>



<p>Families are also asked to attend our 4-day family program. We often say, “You will come for your loved one, but you will stay for yourself.”</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h3 class="wp-block-heading" id="what-to-expect-when-your-loved-one-enters-treatment">What To Expect When Your Loved One Enters Treatment</h3>



<p>When a loved one comes to Cirque for <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/alcohol-rehab/">alcohol</a> or drug issues, family members are called immediately upon admission to assure the family that your loved has arrived safely. Typically you will get a call from the primary therapist in the first 72-hours so they can introduce themselves and hopefully get a history about your perception of why your loved one is in care.</p>



<p>The first 72-hours of your loved one’s care is dedicated to assessments and treatment evaluations at Cirque Lodge. Family members are then, with their loved one’s permission brought into the treatment process either through phone sessions or through weekly face to face sessions. We believe there is more traction gained with family than at any other portion of our alcohol or drug rehab program.</p>
</div>
</div>


<section class="section section--align-center content-wrapper">



    


<div class="wp-block-columns is-layout-flex wp-container-core-columns-is-layout-9d6595d7 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">

<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<picture class="image__picture">
        
    <source srcset="https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/0640Cabin-2-800x0-c-default.webp" media="(min-width: 1440px)"/>

<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="family-program">Family Program</h2>

<p>As we mentioned above the Cirque Lodge Family Program is in our belief the most powerful aspect of healing and recovery in addiction treatment. Family members are deeply influenced by their loved one’s drinking, using, or co-occurring disorders.</p>
<p>Family Week is held every three weeks. It begins on Tuesday with family introductions and the finest lecture concerning addiction as a disease available in <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/drug-rehab/">drug rehab</a> today. The week is made up of multi-systemic group therapy, individual session and experiential workshops. Our admissions department has more information on the <a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/family/family-week-schedule/">schedule</a> for upcoming Family Weeks.</p>
<p><strong>Aspects Discussed in Family Programming Are:</strong></p>
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Meditation</li>
<li>Enabling</li>
<li><a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/codependency/what-is/">Codependency</a></li>
<li>Alcohol and Substance abuse as a disease</li>
<li><a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/family/systems-therapy/">Family Aspects</a></li>
<li>12-step Program</li>
<li>Continuing Care</li>
<li>Self-Care</li>
</ul>
</div>

</div>




</section>


<h2 class="vmb-24 wp-block-heading" id="family-week">Family Week</h2>

        <div class="child-slider__item-text">
            <h3 id="education">Education</h3>
            <p><!-- wp:paragraph --></p>
<p><a href="https://www.cirquelodge.com/treatment/lectures/">Lectures and workshops</a> during our Family Week are intended to provide those involved with the knowledge needed to put fight this disease. Family members are made aware of what alcoholism or drug addiction is, as well as what it does to the brain and to our behaviors.</p>
<p><!-- /wp:paragraph --> <!-- wp:paragraph --></p>
<p>Each day the Family Program at Cirque Lodge consists of different educational concepts to help the family better understand how to appropriately help our loved one, to avoid enabling, and to assist in the healing process.</p>
<p><!-- /wp:paragraph --></p>

        </div>
        <div class="child-slider__item-text">
            <h3 id="therapy">Therapy</h3>
            <p>Multi-systemic family group and individual therapy sessions with client’s and their families are scheduled during the program for those in attendance. Our caring and compassionate master therapists work with the family members to establish effective communication skills but it is a very powerful and necessary piece for both healing and recovery. We believe unequivocally that the therapy program offered during our Family Week is quite simply the best in the addiction treatment industry.</p>

            <h3 id="experiential-aspects">Experiential Aspects</h3>
            <p>During Family Week, time is set aside for the family to take part in different experiential challenges and activities. Many of the activities teach us lessons way beyond an addiction issue. They are often the lessons of life.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="family-in-recovery">Family In Recovery</h2>

<p>A family in recovery will grow and heal together. It is inevitable. When a loved one completes addiction treatment they are like a train rolling down the track. Likewise, family members gain the same momentum by taking part.</p>
<p>There are many support groups for the families. Groups such as <a href="https://al-anon.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Al-anon/ Alateen</a> provide a 12-step approach to living life.</p>
</div>

    link.rel = "stylesheet";
    link.href = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/css/components/dflip.min.css";
    document.head.appendChild(link);

    // Add JS file
    const script = document.createElement("script");
    script.src = "https://www.cirquelodge.com/wp-content/themes/bv-theme/assets/dist/js/components/dflip.min.js";
    script.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.remove('loading');
            document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').click();
        }, 2500);
    });
    document.body.appendChild(script);
}
if (document.querySelector('.dear-flip a'))
document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('href', '#');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('loading');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').classList.add('_df_button');
    document.querySelector('.dear-flip a').setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf')
    loadDFlipAssets();
}, { once: true })

window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    if (window.location.hash.startsWith('#button_pdf')) {
        const link = document.querySelector('.dear-flip a');
        if (link) {
            link.setAttribute('href', '#');
            link.classList.add('loading');
            link.classList.add('_df_button');
            link.setAttribute('id', 'button_pdf');
            loadDFlipAssets();
        }
    }
});
</script>

 Family Program
 

 

 
 Cirque Lodge > Family > Family Program 

 

Family Program – Multi-Systemic Drug and Alcohol Rehab

To facilitate and enhance the healing process, Cirque Lodge involves family members and loved ones in the treatment of residents.

Family involvement is both an effective and integral part to the drug and alcohol rehab center, as well as the recovery process.

Family involvement takes place in several areas,we involve the families prior to admission by collecting information about their loved ones history .

Secondly, families can be and often are involved in weekly therapy sessions with their loved one, facilitated by their master-level therapist.

Families are also asked to attend our 4-day family program. We often say, “You will come for your loved one, but you will stay for yourself.”

What To Expect When Your Loved One Enters Treatment

When a loved one comes to Cirque for alcohol or drug issues, family members are called immediately upon admission to assure the family that your loved has arrived safely. Typically you will get a call from the primary therapist in the first 72-hours so they can introduce themselves and hopefully get a history about your perception of why your loved one is in care.

The first 72-hours of your loved one’s care is dedicated to assessments and treatment evaluations at Cirque Lodge. Family members are then, with their loved one’s permission brought into the treatment process either through phone sessions or through weekly face to face sessions. We believe there is more traction gained with family than at any other portion of our alcohol or drug rehab program.

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Family Program

As we mentioned above the Cirque Lodge Family Program is in our belief the most powerful aspect of healing and recovery in addiction treatment. Family members are deeply influenced by their loved one’s drinking, using, or co-occurring disorders.

Family Week is held every three weeks. It begins on Tuesday with family introductions and the finest lecture concerning addiction as a disease available in drug rehab today. The week is made up of multi-systemic group therapy, individual session and experiential workshops. Our admissions department has more information on the schedule for upcoming Family Weeks.

 Aspects Discussed in Family Programming Are: 

 

Meditation

Enabling

 Codependency 

Alcohol and Substance abuse as a disease

 Family Aspects 

12-step Program

Continuing Care

Self-Care

 

Family Week

 
 

 
Jump To section

 

 
 
 

 Education 
 
 
 

 Therapy 
 
 
 

 Experiential Aspects 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Education

 
 

 Lectures and workshops during our Family Week are intended to provide those involved with the knowledge needed to put fight this disease. Family members are made aware of what alcoholism or drug addiction is, as well as what it does to the brain and to our behaviors.

 

Each day the Family Program at Cirque Lodge consists of different educational concepts to help the family better understand how to appropriately help our loved one, to avoid enabling, and to assist in the healing process.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Therapy

 
Multi-systemic family group and individual therapy sessions with client’s and their families are scheduled during the program for those in attendance. Our caring and compassionate master therapists work with the family members to establish effective communication skills but it is a very powerful and necessary piece for both healing and recovery. We believe unequivocally that the therapy program offered during our Family Week is quite simply the best in the addiction treatment industry.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
Experiential Aspects

 
During Family Week, time is set aside for the family to take part in different experiential challenges and activities. Many of the activities teach us lessons way beyond an addiction issue. They are often the lessons of life.

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 

Family In Recovery

A family in recovery will grow and heal together. It is inevitable. When a loved one completes addiction treatment they are like a train rolling down the track. Likewise, family members gain the same momentum by taking part.

There are many support groups for the families. Groups such as Al-anon/ Alateen provide a 12-step approach to living life.

A Safe Place to Heal and Recover

 

Our individualized treatment programs offer an enriching rehabilitation experience tailored to suit your needs. The breathtaking mountains surrounding our center are the perfect place to heal. Our magnificent location offers unique opportunities to reconnect with your true self and rediscover your love of life.

 

 
 More About Us 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 
About Cirque Lodge

 

 
Cirque Lodge is a recovery retreat providing cognitive and experiential therapies, in the pristine natural beauty of Utah’s Rocky Mountains.

Looking for an drug detox near me?
Luxury Detox Centers: Drug and Alcohol Detoxification Program at Cirque Lodge
Detoxification Program: Drug and Alcohol Exceptional Detox Centers
Cirque Lodge > Treatment > Luxury Detox Centers: Drug and Alcohol Detoxification Program at Cirque Lodge
At Cirque Lodge, we offer a private, medically supervised detox program in a serene and comfortable environment, supported by a dedicated team of licensed medical professionals.
This team ensures thorough care throughout the detox process, addressing the physical and mental challenges of withdrawal.
Exceptional Medical Detox Services
Cirque Lodge Detox Facility
At Cirque Lodge, we employ a medically supervised approach to detox, recognized as the safest and most effective method.
For those considering at-home detox for a loved one, we strongly recommend consulting medical professionals beforehand.
Without appropriate training and resources, home detox can pose significant health risks.
Physical discomfort is often a side effect of going through the detox process, which can lead one back to their drug of choice.
Cirque Lodge’s comprehensive detox program is designed to address both physical and mental symptoms, ensuring safety and comfort.
At Cirque Lodge, our approach prioritizes ongoing care and support, recognizing that detox is only the first step.
Is Detox All That Is Needed to Overcome Addiction?
Detox alone is not sufficient to overcome addiction.
At Cirque Lodge, patients transition seamlessly from detox into our addiction treatment program, tailored to their unique needs.
Our detox program operates within the Studio, located at the entrance to Provo Canyon.
The nurse’s station is located next to the Detox Lounge, equipped with monitoring systems for immediate assistance.
Cirque Lodge ensures a smooth transition from detox to treatment.
During detox, patients are introduced to our facilities and programs.
Our Luxury Detox Facilities in Utah
From the first call to arrival at our mountain luxury detox center, we strive to provide comfort, support, and clarity.
What Makes a Detox Center Luxury?
The best luxury detox retreats offer high-end, personalized treatment services in a comfortable and serene environment.
Alongside expert medical and therapeutic care, luxury detox centers provide amenities and services typically found in luxury hotels, such as private rooms, world-class gyms, and gourmet meals.
Are Luxury Detox Centers More Effective?
While the core treatment principles remain the same, luxury detox centers often provide a higher staff-to-client ratio, ensuring more personalized care.
However, the effectiveness of any detox center, exceptional or otherwise, greatly depends on individual commitment and the quality of the services provided.
How Long Does Detoxification Usually Take at a Luxury Detox Center?
Many of our clients start treatment wondering how long it takes to detox from alcohol at a exceptional medical detox facility like Cirque Lodge.
The length of the detox process depends on the type and severity of the substance use disorder, the individual’s physical health, and their response to treatment.
Generally, the time it takes to detox the body from drugs at a exceptional detox center can last anywhere from a few days to a couple of weeks.
What Types of Therapies Are Offered at Luxury Detox Centers?

Luxury detox centers like Cirque Lodge offer a wide range of therapies, from traditional options like individual and group therapy to holistic and experiential therapies such as art, music, and equine therapy.
Is Detox the Same as Treatment?
Detox is only the first step in the treatment process.
Are Luxury Detox Centers Private?
Luxury detox centers like Cirque Lodge prioritize the privacy and confidentiality of their clients.
Do Luxury Detox Centers Accept Insurance?
When searching “luxury detox near me”, one of the most important criteria to narrow down is whether a facility accepts your insurance.
Luckily, Cirque Lodge accepts insurance for our detox and treatment services.
We can answer any questions you may have about our drug and alcohol rehab, medically supervised detox and our dual diagnosis program.
24/7 Medically Assisted Detox

What is Dual Diagnosis?
Our Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Facilities
A dual diagnosis is when a client presents with a mental health condition and substance use disorder (SUD).

Research is ongoing and aims to increase the efficacy of dual diagnosis treatment.
evidence-based treatment approaches have been developed to help those struggling with dual diagnosis.
Professional treatment is the best option for dual diagnosis treatment, and at Cirque Lodge, you will receive medical detox, comprehensive rehabilitation, and aftercare support.
Our luxury dual diagnosis treatment facilities in Utah combine world-class medical treatment with the serenity of nature, creating a haven for individuals on their healing journey.
Our compassionate admissions team is available 24/7 to assist you, ready to answer any questions you might have about our dual diagnosis program, facilities, or insurance-related queries.

We understand that the decision to seek help for dual diagnosis can be overwhelming, and we’re here to support you at every turn, ensuring a seamless transition into our caring and therapeutic environment.
At Cirque Lodge’s luxury dual diagnosis treatment centers, we offer a peaceful setting for dual diagnosis treatment.

The program at our luxury dual diagnosis treatment center is marked by compassionate and evidence-based treatment approaches, including medical detox, comprehensive rehabilitation, and aftercare support.

Through individualized treatment plans, experiential therapies, and group counseling sessions, the professionals at our luxury dual diagnosis treatment centers address not only the symptoms but also the underlying causes of the disorders.
Whether you or a loved one struggles with a dual diagnosis, Cirque Lodge’s integrated program can provide the help you need or help you find out how to help someone you love with addiction.
Reach out to us today, and take the first step on the path to recovery in the serenity of our luxury dual diagnosis treatment centers in Utah.
Who Needs a Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Center?
Individuals struggling with both a mental health condition and a substance use disorder may benefit from staying at a exceptional dual diagnosis treatment center.
What Therapies Are Used in Luxury Dual Diagnosis Treatment Centers?

A wide range of evidence-based therapies are used at luxury dual diagnosis treatment centers, including cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT), dialectical behavior therapy (DBT), individual and group counseling, family therapy, and experiential therapies such as art therapy, equine therapy, and outdoor adventure therapy.
